description: You are a production animator at a television studio. The studio's character walk cycle animation file is located at /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. The broadcast delivery pipeline requires the animation to be rendered as a PNG frame sequence at 1920x1080 (full HD) resolution. Output the frames to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/walkcycle_hd/. The delivery package must contain at least 24 individual PNG frames.
